rawIntent:
[Feature: Leave management module — Phase 2: Implement Leave Service Logic]

Create src/modules/leave/leave.service.ts to handle business logic for leave requests, including validation and processing. Use LeaveRequest and CreateLeaveRequestDto from src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts.

This phase depends on: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts.

Phase architecture notes:
This phase implements the service layer that processes leave requests and ensures business rules are followed.

successCriteria.description: Leave service logic is implemented and passes all validation and processing tests.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
RBAC enforcement: All API endpoints enforce role-based access control.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Any other modules or files outside of src/modules/leave/leave.service.ts
